name: Prayer of Healing
description: Up to five creatures of your choice who remain within range for the entire casting gain the benefits of a Short Rest and regain 2d8 Hit Points. A creature can't be affected again until it finishes a Long Rest. Engine: each chosen target regains 2d8 (+1d8 per slot level above 2) via the heal resolver; the Short Rest benefit is narrated by the AIGM. Target selection is bounded by the cast UI.
scaling: The healing increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 2.
